_doc: Modular road styles for the editor's Road tool. Each authored road carries a 'style' id (or falls back via kindToStyle from its 'kind'). Edit a style + re-bake to restyle every road that uses it. Fields: core=terrain tile painted as the road; width=base HALF-width in tiles; jitter=how much the width swells/pinches along the road; feather=soft stochastic rim depth in tiles; decor=probability per road tile of a roadside pebble/tuft. The 'bridge' style is just a clean plank deck (core=plank_floor) you draw directly wherever you want a crossing — there is no automatic water detection.
